name: SEPTIC PULMONARY EMBOLI
definition: lodgement of an infected thrombus in a pulmonary artery
discriminating_features: migratory infiltrates (old ones heal, new ones appear)
multiple peripheral parenchymal nodules ± cavitation / air bronchogram (83%)

general: migratory infiltrates (old ones heal, new ones appear)
multiple peripheral parenchymal nodules ± cavitation / air bronchogram (83%)
wedge-shaped subpleural lesion with apex of lesion directed toward pulmonary hilum
"feeding vessel" sign = pulmonary artery leading to nodule (67%)
